title: [MTR 4/JCM] (Un)Legible Prague PIDs
description: Adds Prague inspired custom passenger information display (PID) to Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) mod. Works only with MTR4. You must use Joban Client Mod (JCM).
body:
This resource pack adds custom PIDs to Joban Client Mod (JCM) for Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR). Those PIDs are inspired by both new panels in Prague within redesign effort called Legible Prague (Čitelná Praha) and older style panels.

It supports only PID within Joban Client Mod. So **NO** default display support for now. Also It is not professionaly made script at all, so it may contain bugs. I will try to make fixes and improve resource pack over time.

![Tram PID in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8db229474c922f67e281c3e4dd875a6102d24e2b_0.webp)

![Metro PID in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ead43686af5961a27c92c57ac92f580f303ce7.png)

# Requirments
- Minecraft Transit Railway mod - version 4
- Joban Client Mod - v2.0.0

# How to use
- Enable resource pack in Minecraft
- Right click on Joban PID with brush
- Select PID preset called "Prague Legible Tram"


<details>
<summary>Prague Legible Tram</summary>

![PID in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8db229474c922f67e281c3e4dd875a6102d24e2b_0.webp)
  
<details>
<summary>Hide platform number and station name</summary>
If you want to hide station name in the top, just check "Hide platform number" in the settings. In Prague this options is used mainly in bus and tram sheds.
  
  ![PID without station name and platform number](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b99a78fa2c7c3c01f677dee02806248b5de6962a.png)
  
  ![Hide platform number check box](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7a8110da4e7ea76ffc805638734f99112edc0e6_0.webp)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Custom messages</summary>

  If you want to add custom message that overwrites whole departure board, write the message down to **first** text box.
  If you want to add custom message that rolls at the bottom above the clock, write the message down to **second** text box.
  
![How to set custom messages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6e59862ec2bf500b56906e97e0f42174abdb644_0.webp)

![Rolling message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8773243d1bd160dca813836834e4759162283e7_0.webp)

![Display overwrite message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/188184e013e5a2071ee4ef67ad20665fb273d90d_0.webp)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Variants</summary>

There are few variants of the PID that are available.


  <details>
  <summary>Prague Legible Tram</summary>
    This is the basic variants with all the function that you can see in the title picture
    
  ![Prague Legible Tram](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/340fa06415735edad2f4ba3ce124f3b1e4f668a5.png)
  
  </details>


  <details>
  <summary>Prague Legible Tram [CZ]</summary>
  
  The similar variant to the one above but it has Czech day names in the date line. Use it to feel even more like in Prague.
  
  ![Prague Legible Tram [CZ]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63f467f8285e572895eaf3c8b23d9fa10a54f3a2.png)
  
  </details>

  
  <details>
  <summary>Prague Legible Tram [No Date]</summary>
    
  The similar variant to the one above but it does not have a date at all.
    
    
  ![Prague Legible Tram [No Date]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cee1218ac220addabe279c01e7a475c5eabb927.png)
    
  </details>

  <details>
  <summary>Prague Legible Tram [Simple]</summary>
    It does not show neither top nor bottom line at all. Bottom line shows up only if you set custom message there.
    
  ![Prague Legible Tram [Simple]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ed8d561afb2f353f3fbfa8a11706ce535cc6044.png)
  
  </details>

  <details>
  <summary>Prague Legible Tram [Simple min]</summary>
  
  Like previous variant except it now shows "min" suffix to time. This variant is used on some Prague bus terminals.
  
![Prague Legible Tram [Simple min]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9585eaabb0f045fc9a50893804175c2fbb8ea2cf.png)
  
  </details>

</details>

</details>




<details>
<summary>Prague Metro LCD (since version 3)</summary>

Display type used at entrances to metro station in Prague.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d33a195e655a54dcec44665b93fd4ad712e7c216.png)


<details>
<summary>Hide platform number</summary>
  If you want to hide platform number just check the tick in the panel settings.

  ![Ticked Hide Platform Number](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9919e3f36b062eead29770e918f42de26f631ad7_0.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Custom messages</summary>

  If you want to add custom message that overwrites whole departure board, write the message down to **first** text box.

![Overridden display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ddd083d5d1936902f1f3e91d907078136894bd5.png)
  
  If you want to add custom message to the bottom of the screen, write the message down to **second** text box.

![Message at bottom of the screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c6ce16c7ab7d3ead29055c358535a87678d84d4.png)
  
![How to set custom messages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6e59862ec2bf500b56906e97e0f42174abdb644_0.webp)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Variants</summary>

There are few variants available.


<details>
<summary>Prague DPP Metro LCD [CZ]</summary>
  This variant is closest to the real display. It has Czech and English captions with Czech day names.

![Prague DPP Metro LCD [CZ]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ead43686af5961a27c92c57ac92f580f303ce7.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Prague DPP Metro LCD</summary>
  This variant is closest to the real display, but it has only English captions and day names.

  ![Prague DPP Metro LCD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09363bb3cb1f52723c8493956466c799cd03b273.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Prague Legible Metro LCD [CZ]</summary>
  Fictional variant based on Legible Prague color combinations. It is basically concept how it may looked like but in fact, only thing that's changed are background colors. It has both Czech and Engish captions with Czech day names.

  ![Prague Legible Metro LCD [CZ]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2596e9518353803cbe355533aaf29f826c36a035.png)


</details>


<details>
<summary>Prague Legible Metro LCD</summary>
  Fictional variant based on Legible Prague color combinations. It is basically concept how it may looked like but in fact, only thing that's changed are background colors. It has only English captions and day names.


![Prague Legible Metro LCD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d84d8ab2c834d1c7399c46d377f3cbf9521aa863.png)


</details>




</details>





</details>





# Known issues
Hide Arrivals function is not implemmented and probably never will be as it is directly contradicts the fact, that number of lines is dynamic based on size of used panel.

![Combinations and displays](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/831ba93d3e3e452c2dea5b440643e595c4b3bd2f_0.webp)

# Bug reporting, support and contact information
If you want to contact me regarding bug or some idea how to improve this resource pack, contact me on Discord username: vojta637

# Tested on
- Minecraft Transit Railway mod - FABRIC-4.0.0-prerelease.1+1.20.4
- Joban Client Mod - v2.0.0-beta.12+1.20.4
